first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills or fit. The model did not introduce any new reasoning, positive or negative, based on the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
